chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-4756 of 2022 Asad Ali Awan Versus Mst. Naseem Begum & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA 20206/22 2. For orders on CMA 20207/22 3. For hearing of main case. Dated: 23.10.2023 Mr. Muhammad Arif for petitioner. -.-.- Learned counsel for petitioner, on instructions, does not press this petition on the count that the parties have amicably resolved the issue out of the Court. Petition as such is dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. Judge Judge
